en-GB.name: League Preferences Administration
en-GB.help: Using the league prefences league and global administrators can change some of the settings for a league without modifying the PHP files.
en-GB.prime_help: The primary tournament is used for the front page league table
en-GB.second_help: The secondary tournament is used for front page player performance stats
en-GB.forum_url_help: The link to use in the Forum button on the main menu. Leave this blank for no forum.
en-GB.welcome_help: Message to appear at the top of the home page. This can be HTML.
en-GB.rules_help: The rules to display under the Rules menu. This can be HTML.
en-GB.failedValidate: Oh Noes! The league administration module has failed the ptid!=stid check. Please alert your administrator!
en-GB.failedSave: Sorry, you don't have permission to update this league
en-GB.css_title:
League CSS
(careful if you don't know CSS)
You may need to clear cache after editing.
en-GB.css_help: You can theme your League, but you need to know CSS!
en-GB.core_theme_help: These are pre-built themes you can use, or build from using the League CSS below.
en-GB.tv_help: Usually set this to 1000000, but you can pick other values.
en-GB.tv_sevens_help: Usually set this to 600000, but you can pick other values.
en-GB.min_tv_help: Set a minimum Team Value (TV) that all teams must maintain. This prevents teams (especially stunty teams) from keeping their TV artificially low to farm inducements from higher TV opponents. Set to 0 for no minimum. Teams below this value will be restricted from certain actions like firing players.
en-GB.teams_legend_title:
Teams of Legend/Optional Rosters
Disable old rosters from the team creation page.
(does not interfere with teams already created)
en-GB.teams_legend_help: Tick a team box to disable that team from being available on the team creation page: Ticked box = Disabled.
en-GB.dungeonbowl_title:
Dungeon Bowl Team Rosters
Disable Dungeon Bowl team rosters from the team creation page.
(does not interfere with teams already created)
en-GB.dungeonbowl_help: Tick the box to disable Dungeon Bowl teams from being available on the team creation page: Ticked box = Disabled.
en-GB.sevens_title:
Sevens Team Rosters
Disable Sevens team rosters from the team creation page.
(does not interfere with teams already created)
en-GB.sevens_help: Tick the box to disable Sevens teams from being available on the team creation page: Ticked box = Disabled.
en-GB.fireunder11_title:
Fire Under 11 Players
Allow the firing of players to under 11 on a team.
en-GB.fireunder11_help: Tick the box to allow coaches to be able to fire players that would bring the team to under 11 players (this should not normally be allowed): Ticked box = Allow.
en-GB.randomskillrolls_title:
Automated Random Skills Generator
Disable Automated Random Skill option from Team Management Box.
(do not disable this unless you enable Manual Random Skill Entry below)
en-GB.randomskillrolls_help: Tick the box to disable Automated Random Skills from being available on the team management Box, in which case only Random Skill Manual Entry will be allowed: Ticked box = Disabled.
en-GB.randomskillmanualentry_title:
Manual Random Skill Entry
Disable Manual Random Skill Entry from the Roster/team page.
(do not disable this unless you enable Automated Random Skill Rolls above)
en-GB.randomskillmanualentry_help: Tick the box to disable Manual Random Skill Entry from being available on the Roster/Team Page, in which case only Automated Random Skill generation will be allowed: Ticked box = Disabled.
en-GB.bonuspoints_title:
Additional League Points
Define what bonus points to use. They will be added automatically according to these rules.
(must be used in conjunction with a Ranking System in the Tournament Manager that includes [bonus])
en-GB.bonuspoints_help: Define how many bonus points to award for Major Wins, Major Beatings and Clean Sheets. Entering 0 points for all three will hide the Additonal League points calculator on the Match Report.
en-GB.major_win_tds: Major Win TDs = Major Win for scoring how many TDs? Set No of TDs here, usually 3.
en-GB.major_win_pts: Major Win Points = Bonus points earned for a Major Win, usually 1. Enter 0 to hide on Match report.
en-GB.clean_sheet_pts: Clean Sheet Points = Bonus points for conceding 0 TDs (clean sheet), usually 1. Enter 0 to hide on Match report.
en-GB.major_beat_cas: Major Beating Casualties = Major Beating for scoring how many CAS? Set No of CAS here, usually 3.
en-GB.major_beat_pts: Major Beating Points = Bonus points earned for a Major Beating, usually 1. Enter 0 to hide on Match report.
en-GB.base_inducements_title:
Base Inducements Only
Disable inducements not in the main rulebook.
en-GB.base_inducements_help: Tick the box to disable inducements from sources other than the main rules from being available: Ticked box = Disabled.
en-GB.prayer_cost_title:
Prayers to Nuffle Cost Override
Modify the cost of the Prayers to Nuffle inducement.
en-GB.prayer_cost_help: Set a custom cost for the Prayers to Nuffle inducement for this league. Set to 0 to use the standard cost from game data (usually 10,000). This allows you to balance the cost if you find it too cheap or expensive for your league.
en-GB.megastars_title:
Mega-Stars
Disable Mega-Stars from inducements.
(see latest FAQ for list of which Star Players are classed as Mega-Stars)
en-GB.megastars_help: Tick the box to disable Mega-Stars from being available on inducements: Ticked box = Disabled.
en-GB.megastar_tax_title:
Mega-Star Tax
Set an additional cost (flat fee in gold) to add to all Mega-Star hiring costs.
en-GB.megastar_tax_help: Set an additional cost (flat fee in gold) to add to all Mega-Star hiring costs. This is added on top of the standard cost for Mega-Star players. Set to 0 for no additional tax. Example: Setting this to 50000 would add 50k gold to every Mega-Star's cost.
en-GB.banned_stars_title:
Banned Star Players
Select which Star Players should not be available for hire in this league.
This allows you to ban specific stars that are too powerful or don't fit your league's playstyle, regardless of whether they are Mega-Stars or not.
en-GB.banned_stars_help: Select which Star Players should not be available for hire in this league. This allows you to ban specific stars that are too powerful or don't fit your league's playstyle, regardless of whether they are Mega-Stars or not.
en-GB.banned_stars_note: Hold Ctrl (Windows) or Cmd (Mac) to select multiple stars
